name: Welcome Journey - Day 1
content:
%%=v(@preheader)=%% Welcome to the community!

%%[SET @firstName = AttributeValue("FirstName")]%% Welcome, %%=v(@firstName)=%%!

%%=ContentBlockByKey("welcome_intro")=%% We're excited to have you on board.

Explore Now

How It Works

1
 Set up your profile for personalized recommendations.
2
 Browse trending categories curated by our editors.
3
 Earn double points on your first 30 days of purchases.
